name: Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited
description: Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited is a leading gold mining and exploration company with operations in South Africa and Papua New Guinea. With over 70 years of experience, the company is one of the world's largest gold producers, specializing in underground and surface gold mining, as well as copper exploration. Harmony is committed to sustainable mining practices, delivering long-term value to its stakeholders while prioritizing environmental stewardship and community development.
